stemHtml:
Refer to figures or NANTES - Charts 19-1, 19-2, 19-3 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
An aircraft departing Nantes Atlantique aerodrome (LFRS) under VFR and intending to follow the Loire River towards the northeast can expect which initial departure procedure and altitude?

options.a: A turn towards reporting point E to avoid the city of Nantes at an altitude of 1500 ft.
options.b: A turn towards reporting point NE to avoid the city of Nantes at an altitude of 1000 ft.
options.c: A turn towards reporting point W to avoid the city of Nantes at an altitude of 1000 ft.
options.d: Climb on runway heading to a minimum of 1000 ft before following the Loire River to the northeast.
